title: Thirukutralam
tagline: Thirukutralam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thirukutralam represents one of the five Pancha Sabhas of Nataraja - Chitra Sabhai.
overview.description: Thirukutralam represents one of the five Pancha Sabhas of Nataraja - Chitra Sabhai. The five dance halls of Shiva are Chidambaram, Madurai, Thiruvalangadu, Tirunelveli and Kutralam. Kutralam is also known as Trikootaachalam.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Coutrallam Falls
topPlaces.description: Coutrallam Falls (also called Kutralam/Kuttalam Falls) is located in Tenkasi district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu bordering Kollam district, Kerala. The falls is located on the Western Ghats on the river Chittar and is considered a "medical spa" on account of the medical smell in the waters.

topPlaces.name: Courtallam
topPlaces.description: Courtallam, natively spelt Kutrālam or Kuttālam, is a panchayat town situated at a mean elevation of 160 m (520 ft) in the foothills of the Western Ghats in Tenkasi district of Tamil Nadu, India. The Coutrallam Falls on the Chittar River is a major tourist attraction.

topPlaces.name: Melagaram
topPlaces.description: Melagaram is a panchayat town in Tenkasi district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The Famous Composer Thirigudarasapa Kavirayar was born in Melagaram.

topPlaces.name: Ilanji
topPlaces.description: Ilanji is a panchayat town in Tenkasi district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located between the towns Tenkasi and Shencottah.

topPlaces.name: Aintharuviar River
topPlaces.description: The Aintharuviar River is a river flowing in the Tirunelveli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a tributary of the Chittar River, which itself is a major tributary of the Thamirabarani River.

topPlaces.name: Aintharuvi
topPlaces.description: Aintharuvi ( five falls ) is a group of five waterfalls, that is near the Coutrallam Falls of Tamil Nadu, in India. It is located in Tenkasi.

topPlaces.name: Kottakulam
topPlaces.description: Kottakulam is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kottakulam is aka Sumaitheernthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Piranoor
topPlaces.description: Piranoor is a Panchayat Village of Tenkasi Block and Shenkottai Taluk. in Tenkasi district, Tamil Nadu, India, in the foothills of the Western Ghats.

items.note: Coutrallam Falls (also called Kutralam/Kuttalam Falls) is located in Tenkasi district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu bordering Kollam district, Kerala. The falls is located on the Western Ghats on the river Chittar and is considered a "medical spa" on account of the medical smell in the waters.

Courtallam, natively spelt Kutrālam or Kuttālam, is a panchayat town situated at a mean elevation of 160 m (520 ft) in the foothills of the Western Ghats in Tenkasi district of Tamil Nadu, India. The Coutrallam Falls on the Chittar River is a major tourist attraction.
Melagaram is a panchayat town in Tenkasi district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The Famous Composer Thirigudarasapa Kavirayar was born in Melagaram.
Ilanji is a panchayat town in Tenkasi district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located between the towns Tenkasi and Shencottah.

The Aintharuviar River is a river flowing in the Tirunelveli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a tributary of the Chittar River, which itself is a major tributary of the Thamirabarani River.
Aintharuvi ( five falls ) is a group of five waterfalls, that is near the Coutrallam Falls of Tamil Nadu, in India. It is located in Tenkasi.
Kottakulam is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kottakulam is aka Sumaitheernthapuram.
Piranoor is a Panchayat Village of Tenkasi Block and Shenkottai Taluk. in Tenkasi district, Tamil Nadu, India, in the foothills of the Western Ghats.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirukutralam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirukutralam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (63 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirukutralam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirukutralam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirukutralam?
faq.a: Stays in Thirukutralam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirukutralam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Coutrallam Falls, Courtallam, Melagaram, Ilanji, Aintharuviar River.
